positive: Minimalist, stylized illustration of a crescent moon cradling an abstract geometric mountain range at sunrise. The style is clean linework mixed with vibrant watercolor washes, giving a celestial, ethereal feel. Use a palette of deep indigo, soft blush pink, gold foil accents, and burnt orange. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, suitable for a square t-shirt print. Focus on strong, contrasting silhouettes against a gradient sky. Highly detailed, vector-style precision, suitable for commercial textile printing, clean edges, dot art details.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, noise, extra limbs, low detail, photorealistic, cluttered, busy background
